mapper.select: SELECT stock_id, item_id, quantity, arrival_date, expiry_date, stock_status, updated_at FROM stocks
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO stocks (item_id, quantity, arrival_date, expiry_date, stock_status) VALUES (#{itemId}, #{quantity}, #{arrivalDate}, #{expiryDate}, #{stockStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE stocks SET item_id = #{itemId}, quantity = #{quantity}, arrival_date = #{arrivalDate}, expiry_date = #{expiryDate}, stock_status = #{stockStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE stock_id = #{stockId}
